title: Nokia mod
description: Just a mod that adds the best item possible
body:
# This mod adds the item you need in your Minecraft experience: The nokia 3310 
![HsyOwbe.md.png](https://iili.io/HsyOwbe.md.png)



This mod is cool to add to your modpack. The Nokia 3310 is hard to create

![HsyOje9.md.png](https://iili.io/HsyOje9.md.png)

# Bedrock Miner Crafting Recipe
![Craft](https://i.ibb.co/dc3SJwP/Captura-de-ecr-2023-07-20-211526.png)

# Use a redstone signal on the bedrock miner to obtain Bedrock
![Miner Showcase](https://i.ibb.co/tm7s8HH/Captura-de-ecr-2023-07-20-211652.png)


## Nokia UI
![UI](https://i.ibb.co/jGkpxZN/Captura-de-ecr-2023-07-20-211740.png)


## FAQ:

What can you do with this item?
> For now nothing, but I'm looking to add an interface on future updates

Why would someone want to download this mod?
> To enter a cool and hard challenge, and get this ultimate destruction weapon

This mod is not affiliated with the Nokia Corporation™️
